display.purpose: Page titles, largest headings. Fixed rem, no fluid clamp in product chrome.

body.purpose: Default UI text and list rows.

label.purpose: Counts, badges, timestamps, metadata. Tabular-nums where numeric; short only.

reading.purpose: The reader column. Serif, 19px / 1.6 / 680px (~71ch) default; size (12-28px), measure (480-760px), leading, family and theme are all reader-controlled.

shadows.name: shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Hairline lift: card hover, selected rows, segmented active thumb.

shadows.name: shadow-paper
shadows.purpose: Sheet on a desk: the newspaper broadsheet and magazine contents leaf. A page resting on paper, not a floating card. Zeroed on E-ink.

shadows.name: edge-hi
shadows.purpose: Top-edge sheen on raised surfaces; the physical page-edge highlight.

motion.name: dur-fast
motion.purpose: Hover/state transitions on buttons, nav, inputs.

motion.name: ease
motion.purpose: Standard ease-out; quiet deceleration, never bounce.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one true action in a region. Solid ink-blue, used sparingly.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--accent, #3a5e8c); color: var(--accent-contrast, #fff); border: 1px solid var(--accent, #3a5e8c); border-radius: var(--radius, 9px); padding: 0.42rem 0.85rem; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22,0.61,0.36,1), border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22,0.61,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, #3a5e8c) 88%, #000); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent, #3a5e8c); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: The workhorse button: paper surface, hairline border.
components.css: .ds-btn { background: var(--surface, #fdfcf9); color: var(--text, #2a2620); border: 1px solid var(--border, #e4ded1); border-radius: var(--radius, 9px); padding: 0.42rem 0.85rem; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22,0.61,0.36,1), background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22,0.61,0.36,1); } .ds-btn:hover { border-color: var(--border-strong, #d6cfbf); background: var(--surface-alt, #ece7dd); } .ds-btn:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: default; }

components.name: Icon Button
components.description: Square transparent button for toolbar glyphs; fills on hover.
components.html: <button class="ds-icon-btn" aria-label="More"><svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><circle cx="5" cy="12" r="2"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="2"/><circle cx="19" cy="12" r="2"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-icon-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 2.25rem; height: 2.25rem; border: 0; border-radius: var(--radius, 9px); background: transparent; color: var(--text-muted, #56503f); cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22,0.61,0.36,1), color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22,0.61,0.36,1); } .ds-icon-btn:hover { background: var(--surface-alt, #ece7dd); color: var(--text, #2a2620); }

components.name: Search Field
components.description: Pill-shaped field with inline icon; the inner input is chromeless.
components.css: .ds-search { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.3rem; height: 2rem; padding: 0 0.55rem; border: 1px solid var(--border, #e4ded1); border-radius: var(--radius, 9px); background: var(--surface, #fdfcf9); color: var(--text-muted, #56503f); transition: border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22,0.61,0.36,1); } .ds-search:focus-within { border-color: var(--border-strong, #d6cfbf); } .ds-search input { width: 7.5rem; padding: 0; border: 0; background: transparent; font-size: 0.8125rem; color: var(--text, #2a2620); outline: none; }

components.name: Segmented Control
components.description: Track-and-thumb toggle (All / Unread / Read). Active segment lifts.
components.css: .ds-seg { display: inline-flex; gap: 0.2rem; padding: 0.2rem; background: var(--surface-alt, #ece7dd); border-radius: var(--radius, 9px); } .ds-seg button { padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem; border: 0; border-radius: calc(var(--radius, 9px) - 3px); background: transparent; color: var(--text-muted, #56503f); font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms, color 120ms; } .ds-seg button:hover { color: var(--text, #2a2620); } .ds-seg button.on { background: var(--surface, #fdfcf9); color: var(--text, #2a2620); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(31,28,22,0.05); }

components.name: Tag Chip
components.description: Fully-rounded quiet tag with inline remove button.
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; font-size: 0.75rem; padding: 0.15rem 0.2rem 0.15rem 0.55rem; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--surface-alt, #ece7dd); color: var(--text-muted, #56503f); } .ds-tag button { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 1.05rem; height: 1.05rem; border: 0; border-radius: 999px; background: transparent; color: var(--text-muted, #56503f); cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms, color 120ms; } .ds-tag button:hover { background: var(--border-strong, #d6cfbf); color: var(--text, #2a2620); }

components.name: Card Row
components.description: Signature article/list row. Transparent at rest on a hairline-divided list; unread dot at left; progress bar pinned to the bottom edge.
components.html:
Issues found by automatic diagnosis

Automatic diagnosis · newsletter.lectern.local · 6 min
components.css: .ds-card { position: relative; display: flex; gap: 0.9rem; align-items: flex-start; padding: 0.85rem 0.55rem 0.9rem 1.45rem; border-radius: var(--radius-lg, 14px); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border, #e4ded1); transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22,0.61,0.36,1), box-shadow 120ms; } .ds-card:hover { background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--surface-alt, #ece7dd) 55%, transparent); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(31,28,22,0.05); } .ds-card h3 { margin: 0; font-family: var(--font-serif, 'Iowan Old Style', Charter, 'Literata', Georgia, serif); font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.25; letter-spacing: -0.005em; } .ds-card p { margin: 0.2rem 0 0; font-size: 0.8125rem; color: var(--text-muted, #56503f); } .ds-dot { position: absolute; left: 0.5rem; top: 1.45rem; width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--accent, #3a5e8c); } .ds-progress { position: absolute; left: 0; bottom: 0; height: 2px; width: var(--p, 100%); background: var(--accent, #3a5e8c); border-radius: 0 999px 999px 0; } .ds-progress.done { width: 100%; background: var(--ok, #3f7d56); opacity: 0.55; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Rail link. Muted at rest, fills on hover, accent-on-wash when active.
components.css: .ds-nav a { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.65rem; padding: 0.46rem 0.55rem; border-radius: var(--radius, 9px); color: var(--text-muted, #56503f); font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.2; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms, color 120ms; } .ds-nav a:hover { background: var(--surface-alt, #ece7dd); color: var(--text, #2a2620); } .ds-nav a.active { background: var(--accent-soft, #e7edf4); color: var(--accent, #3a5e8c); font-weight: 600; } .ds-count { margin-left: auto; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; opacity: 0.85; } .ds-nav a.active .ds-count { color: var(--accent, #3a5e8c); }

narrative.overview: Lectern is a quiet, well-lit room built for one purpose: reading. Every surface is warm paper and hushed chrome; the loudest thing on any screen should be a column of words. The palette is warm tinted neutrals (never pure black or white), carrying one restrained ink-blue accent that appears rarely and means something. Type is set on a single disciplined scale; spacing follows one rhythm; borders are hairlines; motion is fast and quiet. Readability is the headline feature: the reader controls typeface, measure, size, and theme, with seven themes and four bundled reading faces tuned for legibility and dyslexia. Target is WCAG AAA where feasible.
keyCharacteristics: Warm paper neutrals; never pure #000 or #fff.
One ink-blue accent (#3a5e8c), used on ≤10% of any screen.
Hairline borders + soft warm shadows; depth is paper-tactile, not glassy.
A single 8-step type scale and a 4pt-based spacing rhythm.
Fast, quiet motion (120-180ms); the page never bounces or struts.
Reader-owned typography and seven themes; accessibility is built in, not bolted on.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The ink-blue accent appears on ≤10% of any screen. It marks exactly one thing per region: the active route, the primary action, the unread state.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutral Rule
rules.body: Pure #000 and #fff are forbidden. Every neutral is warmed toward the paper hue. Gray text on a colored ground is forbidden — use a darker shade of that ground instead.

rules.name: The Reader-Owns-Type Rule
rules.body: In the reading column, type size, measure, family, and theme are the reader's to set, not the designer's. Ship sensible defaults; never lock them.

rules.name: The Measure Rule
rules.body: Body and reading columns cap at ~65-75ch (the shared .page column is 44rem). Wider is fatiguing and forbidden.

rules.name: The Theme-Fidelity Rule
rules.body: The reading column is tuned per theme. Dark grounds open the leading (--prose-leading-boost 0.06) and pull images back from the flashlight effect (--prose-img-filter brightness 0.86); highlight marks multiply into light papers but switch to a 26% translucent tint on dark themes; text selection is a 25%-accent-into-bg mix so the passage stays AAA on every theme.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Resting surfaces are flat with a 1px hairline. Shadow is a response — to hover, to floating, to focus — never decoration.

dos: Do keep the Ink-Blue accent (#3a5e8c) on ≤10% of any screen; mark one thing per region.
Do tint every neutral toward the warm paper hue; never a flat gray card.
Do use a single 8px dot, a bottom progress bar, or weight/opacity to signal card state.
Do keep surfaces flat with a 1px hairline at rest; add shadow only when something floats, hovers, or focuses.
Do cap reading and body measure at ~65-75ch.
Do let the reader own type size, measure, family, and theme in the reading column.
Do keep motion fast and quiet (120ms/180ms, cubic-bezier(0.22,0.61,0.36,1)); honor prefers-reduced-motion.
Do color placeholder and muted UI text with Faded Ink (--text-muted, #56503f) at full opacity so every chromeless field clears AA; never leave a placeholder at the UA-default light gray.
Do hold WCAG AAA where feasible; preserve the high-contrast theme and reading faces.
donts: Don't build a busy social feed: no infinite-scroll bait, no algorithmic reordering, no scatter of notification badges.
Don't ship a sterile corporate SaaS look: no gray cards, no cold default blue, no Inter-everything template, no hero-metric tiles.
Don't use the flashy AI aesthetic: no dark-mode neon, no glassmorphism, no purple-to-blue gradients, no glowing accents, no gradient text.
Don't build a cluttered power-user IDE: no wall of dense panels and tiny controls; disclose power progressively.
Don't use a border-left/border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe, except the reader highlight marker where the stripe color encodes the user's highlight color.
Don't use pure #000 or #fff, gray text on colored grounds, or saturated semantic reds/greens.
Don't put a resting drop shadow on a static card, or blur a panel for effect.
